note: Initialized Ghostlight with a stripped-down Epiphany-style persistence spine: canonical map, scratch, evidence, handoff, implementation plan, and Python state or compaction helpers.

Migrated Ghostlight-owned research and architecture notes out of VoidBot and into this repo; Ghostlight is now the canonical home for personality, culture, state-projection, and Aetheria persistent-world design notes.

Rejected the prior corridor-crisis game slice as Ghostlight active direction; current Aetheria consumer target is Call of the Void content generation plus narrated timeline dialogue and procedural drama scaffolding.

Imported the scattered Call of the Void Google Doc brainstorm into docs/aetheria/call-of-the-void-brainstorm.md as raw source material; compact canon remains the AetheriaLore Call of the Void design note.

Clarified Ghostlight authoring rationale: the system should build drama and narrative pressure, then render character-local dialogue context packs constrained to what each character knows, feels, wants, remembers, hides, and perceives.

Corrected Call of the Void continuity drift: old colony-fleet no-return twist is obsolete; current pressure should come from the whole Solar system being sequestered into Elysium with its institutions, conflicts, and unresolved machinery intact.
Added v0 canonical agent-state schema, required first-class dimension list, Call of the Void example fixture, and dependency-free validation script. schema:validate passes on the first fixture.

Split performed self from voice style in the v0 schema: presentation_strategy now includes abrasive_boundary and ironic_distance, while voice_style carries sarcasm, dryness, sincerity evasion, emotional evasion, and banter-as-boundary handles.

Added agent-state variable glossary defining numeric components, current v0 labels, label-set policy, and why canonical fixtures include full required vectors rather than only strongly applicable labels.

Removed certainty from canonical authored state variables. Canonical character state now stores mean, plasticity, and current_activation; perceived/inferred dimensions use confidence when a read can be wrong.

Reworked perceived dimensions so observer reads do not know canonical mean or plasticity. Perceived state now tracks observed_activation, attributed_disposition, and confidence to model fundamental attribution bias; confidence is driven by evidence, emotion, stakes, memory, prejudice, and social reinforcement.

Expanded voice_style from a narrow quirk set into a broad required communication vector covering register, pace, precision, disclosure, politeness, humor, dominance, responsiveness, and related speech mechanics.

Added explicit voice_style axes for lyricism, coded_politeness, theatricality, and technical_compression so the required vector preserves the intended speech examples rather than folding them into weaker adjacent labels.

Separated verbal_response_strategy from voice_style. Sarcastic deflection, sincerity evasion, emotional evasion, banter-as-boundary, and verbal aggression are pressure-activated speech defenses, not baseline voice texture.

Removed verbal_response_strategy as a canonical layer. Defensive verbal moves should emerge during projection from interactions among underlying organization, dispositions, behavioral dimensions, presentation strategy, situational pressure, relationship context, and voice style.
Kept sarcastic deflection, sincerity evasion, emotional evasion, banter-as-boundary, and verbal aggression as target emergent behaviors for projection tests rather than canonical state fields.

Removed forbidden_context from dialogue context packs. Packs are positive speaker-local payloads; unknown or author-only material is omitted by the projection builder, while known secrets are expressed through goals, beliefs, memories, and presentation constraints.
Relationship stance is directional. Added Oz->Cat alongside Cat->Oz in the Call of the Void fixture and taught the validator to require reciprocal relationship edges for represented agent pairs.

Defined prompt projection as a six-stage contract: select speaker-local inputs, compute active pressure, detect tensions, derive response affordances, render compact prompt sections, then evaluate whether target verbal behaviors emerge from state interactions.

Persisted projection distillation plan: use a frontier teacher to generate reviewed projection artifacts, collect accepted and rejected examples, then train a smaller student projector only after the projection schema, input slicer, and evaluator stabilize.

Evaluation follow-up accepted immediate schema fixes: split interpersonal_warmth from verbal_warmth, add Cat perception of Oz, populate Cat/Oz relationship summaries, enrich event-drone-lie with observed exchange, private interpretations, and event effects, and park broader social-simulation mechanisms in docs/architecture/schema-future-mechanisms.md.

Added ghostlight.projection_example.v0 schema, first reviewed Cat/Oz projection JSONL examples for scene-broken-taxi-oz, projection example validator, and package scripts that validate both agent-state and projection seams. Next projection implementation step is deterministic speaker-local input slicing.

Projection prompt_text must be self-sufficient for the dialogue model: include speaker-local setting, historical, cultural, socioeconomic, and embodiment context needed for the turn rather than relying on source refs or the full projection artifact.

Revised Aetheria projection-training architecture: grounded training data should start from authored historical lore flashpoints, while Elysium gameplay-era scenes such as Cat/Oz are procedural branch material unless explicitly promoted. Next step is a lore grounding digest format and first historical flashpoint selection.

Added ghostlight.lore_grounding_digest.v0 schema, template, human format guide, and validator. Lore digests now explicitly model cultural pressure fields, factional misread maps, role pressures, speaker lore boundaries, and author-only exclusions. Next step is choosing the first authored historical Aetheria flashpoint and filling a real digest.

Cold Wake Panic is selected as the first historical grounding fixture. Use it as pre-Elysium projection training feedstock via examples/lore-grounding/cold-wake-panic.ganymede-corridor.json, not as the active Ghostlight game target.
